title: Surreal Gallery Fashion Editorial AI
sourceTitle: Surreal Gallery Fashion Editorial AI Prompt

imagePrompts.prompt: Theme: Hyper-realistic vertical fashion editorial built around gigantic suspended paper halo rings with thick circular apertures and different Hollywood-style female fashion models with pensive and intense expressions. Subject: different Hollywood-style female fashion models with pensive and intense expressions appear inside the circular apertures of gigantic suspended paper halo rings with thick circular apertures, each holding distinct cinematic fashion poses and emotional expressions. Scene: a minimalist futuristic luxury gallery installation space surrounds the suspended ring installation with clean negative space, smoky graphite depth, and a futuristic luxury gallery atmosphere. Composition: Fixed 4:5 vertical magazine-cover composition with thick-rimmed halo rings layered through the frame, circular apertures as portrait windows, shallow depth, and uncluttered museum-grade spacing. Style: Hyper-realistic high-fashion editorial photography with futuristic installation design, polished luxury magazine finish, sharp skin detail, and elegant surrealism. Color Palette: Fixed neon ivory ring highlights, deep midnight-blue shadows, soft frost lavender aperture glow, muted antique gold accents, and smoky graphite gradients. Lighting: Dramatic studio lighting with soft volumetric depth, high-contrast luxury shadows, precise rim highlights on the rings, and luminous portrait apertures. Camera: 85mm editorial portrait lens, shallow depth of field, sharp focus on faces and ring edges, controlled studio perspective. Signature Elements: Suspended paper halo rings, layered circular portrait windows, multiple high-fashion expressions, minimalist gallery space, and futuristic luxury editorial atmosphere. Restrictions: Keep the image text-free, unbranded, watermark-free, coherent, elegant, sharply focused, and uncluttered.

promptTranslations.zh:
使用以下英文图像生成提示词；保留可见文字、品牌名、变量值和参数为英文。
